titleStmt.title: SII 9.637: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 637. (A.R. No. 682 of 1922.) ON THE EAST WALL OF THE MANDAPA OF THE ANANTASAYANA TEMPLE AT ANANTASAYANAGUDI, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1471, Saumya, Pushya, śu. 9 corresponding to A.D. 1549 December 28, Saturday (not verifiable). It records that Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya made a grant of 4 paḍis of rice per day out of the provision for the Anantaśayana temple, for the service of the god Hanumantadēva of Jambukēśvara hill.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa 1471 saumyasaṁvatsarada puśya śu 9 lu
śrīmaṁmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrāpratāpa śrīvīrasadāsiva
dēvamahārāyaru makarasaṁkrāṁti pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu jaṁbukēśvarada beṭṭada
hanumaṁtadēvara neyivēdyake Anaṁtaśayanadēvara Amrutapaḍige
saluva svāsteya voḷage nāu kaṭṭaḷeya māḍidu dina 1 kke Akki paḍi 4
nāluku paḍi Akkiyanu kaṭaḷeyanu māḍi Ācaṁdrārkavāgi naḍeva hāge
śilāśāsanava hākisi koṭeU [.] svādatādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradatānupālanaṁ
(hārināṁ) paradatāpahārēṇa svadataṁ niṣpalaṁ bhavētu .
Digital edition of SII 9.637 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
